description: Style NoteWear these fashion forward and trendy sunglasses from basics and step out in style. The lenses in these sunglasses feature high optical precision and are impact resistant. Wear this pair and step out in penache. The glasses come in a signature Basics case.Product DetailsLens colour: Dark greyLens type: Polarized lens with 100% UV protection, distortion free and impact resistantFrame colour: BlackFrame type: Full metal frame with thin metallic arms  High bridge and fixed nosepadsThe glasses come in a Basics caseMaterial and CarePlastic and metalRemove dust and grime by gently wiping the lens with the cloth providedRmove oil or tough stains with the help of a lens cleaner and do not use your fingersDo not place your glasses on uneven surfaces or heated areas (like a dashboard)SizeLens width: 57 mm
